summary:
You are given an array temperatures where each element is the temperature recorded on a given day. For each day, determine how many days you must wait until a warmer temperature occurs.

Return an array of the same length where each position holds that waiting count. If no later day is warmer, put 0 in that position.

examples.explanation: From day 0 (73) the next warmer day is day 1, so 1. From day 2 (75) the next warmer day is day 6, four days later. The last two days never see a warmer temperature, so they are 0.
Each day is warmer than the previous, so every day waits exactly one day except the last.

constraints: Output length equals the input length
A value of 0 indicates no future day is warmer
